text: This is an operation labroscopic nephrectomy to remove the kidney.
The surgical team has removed the fascia, exposing the underlying structures of the kidney during the laparoscopic nephrectomy.
The surgeon visually identifies the kidney and the renal vein during the laparoscopic nephrectomy procedure.
The kidney is visibly removed from the surgical field during the laparoscopic nephrectomy procedure.
